mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, todo_date, category, time_slot, is_completed, duration_time, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND todo_date = #{todoDate} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE time_slot WHEN 'MORNING' THEN 1 WHEN 'AFTERNOON' THEN 2 WHEN 'EVENING' THEN 3 WHEN 'DAWN' THEN 4 ELSE 99 END, created_at asc

SELECT id, user_id, title, todo_date, category, time_slot, is_completed, duration_time, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM todos WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos ( user_id, time_slot, category, title, duration_time, todo_date, is_completed ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{timeSlot}, #{category}, #{title}, #{durationTime}, #{todoDate}, #{isCompleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, time_slot = #{timeSlot}, duration_time = #{durationTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE todos SET is_completed = true, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_completed = false
